CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER, value FLOAT);
SELECT AVG(value) AS average_value FROM test_table WHERE id BETWEEN 1 AND 5;
SELECT AVG(sub.value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS sub;
CREATE TABLE another_table (category TEXT, amount FLOAT);
SELECT category, AVG(amount) FROM another_table GROUP BY category;
SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM another_table WHERE category = 'A');
SELECT AVG(value) FROM (SELECT DISTINCT value FROM test_table WHERE value IS NOT NULL) AS distinct_values;
CREATE TABLE complex_table (group_id INTEGER, data FLOAT);
SELECT AVG(data) FROM complex_table WHERE group_id = 1 UNION SELECT AVG(data) FROM complex_table WHERE group_id = 2;
SELECT AVG((SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_table) + value) FROM test_table;
SELECT AVG((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM another_table WHERE category = 'B') + value) FROM test_table;
SELECT AVG(value) FROM test_table WHERE value BETWEEN 10 AND 30;
